description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On May 18 (Monday, Reiwa 8), a certificate of appreciation from the Minister of Justice was presented to Junko Mori, who retired as a human rights ombudsperson on March 31, 2026, by Koji Takayama, Director of the Tokorozawa Branch of the Saitama Regional Legal Affairs Bureau.

We also held a ceremony to present the appointment certificate to Michiko Ohno, who was newly appointed as a human rights ombudsperson effective April 1, 2026.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202605/13575.html
summary: 📝 Mayor: Appreciation ceremony for human rights ombudspersons
